items.title: NousResearch releases: Hermes Agent v0.19.0 (2026.7.20) — The Quicksilver Release
items.description:
# Hermes Agent v0.19.0 (v2026.7.20)


**Release Date:** July 20, 2026
**Since v0.18.0:** ~2,245 commits · ~1,065 merged PRs · ~2,465 files changed · ~300,000 insertions · ~36,000 deletions · **~3,300 issues closed** · **450+ community contributors**

> **The Quicksilver Release.** Hermes is the mess

faq_items.question: What are the key considerations for safety and alignment in long-horizon AI models?
faq_items.answer: Key considerations include ensuring ethical use, preventing unintended consequences, and maintaining transparency to align with human values over extended periods.

faq_items.question: What is langgenius/dify and how does it help with AI workflows?
faq_items.answer: Langgenius/Dify is a collaborative workspace that supports rich AI model integration and tooling for building agentic workflows and RAG pipelines, enabling seamless deployment.

faq_items.question: How can AI be used to generate HD short videos from keywords or topics?
faq_items.answer: AI tools like harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo use large language models and automated workflows to create high-definition short videos quickly based on provided themes or keywords.

faq_items.question: What is Graphify-Labs/graphify, and what problem does it solve?
faq_items.answer: Graphify-Labs/graphify converts codebases along with their documentation, SQL schemas, configurations, and PDFs into queryable knowledge graphs, facilitating easier data access and querying.

faq_items.question: What new features were introduced in the latest release of Hermes Agent by NousResearch?
faq_items.answer: In Hermes Agent v0.19.0 (2026.7.20), also known as the Quicksilver Release, several updates and improvements were made to enhance functionality and user experience across various aspects.
